connections.note: Standard code review + specialized audit = comprehensive quality
connections.when: Combining extension audit methodology with code review

connections.note: Audit identifies performance candidates, profiling investigates deeply
connections.when: extension audit methodology depends on performance profiling
connections.yields: performance profiling required patterns and guidance

connections.when: extension audit methodology needs VS Code extension patterns context
connections.yields: VS Code extension patterns supporting context

connections.when: extension audit methodology needs refactoring patterns context

connections.note: Pre-release audit is part of release workflow
connections.when: extension audit methodology needs release management context

connections.note: Audit findings feed into debt backlog
connections.when: extension audit methodology needs technical debt tracking context

artifacts: audit-report.md with executive summary and recommendations
dead code inventory with file locations
decisions: which console statements to keep vs remove
which dead commands to fix vs delete
which blocking operations to refactor first
code quality grade (A+, A, B+, etc.)
nextSteps: recompile and verify zero TypeScript errors
smoke test all command palette items
